mapper.insert: insert into t_waste_total_plan (waste_dict_id, ent_code, out_put_id, `year`, annual_limit, first_limit, second_limit, third_limit, fourth_limit, warn_val, alarm_val, remark) values (#{wasteDictId}, #{entCode}, #{outPutId}, #{year}, #{annualLimit}, #{firstLimit}, #{secondLimit}, #{thirdLimit}, #{fourthLimit}, #{warnVal}, #{alarmVal}, #{remark})
mapper.delete: delete from t_waste_total_plan where waste_dict_id = #{wasteDictId} and ent_code = #{entCode} and out_put_id = #{outPutId} and `year` = #{year}
